title: doctor validate.ts exceeds 500-line file-size cap
body:
The file is 644 lines after #394.

## Repro
1. `wc -l src/doctor/validate.ts`
2. Observe > 500

## Fix
Split the rule table out. See also #394.

title: Plain issue with no markdown control characters in its body
body: A short plain description with no hashes or fences.
